texto: Now everybody's got a crazy notion of their own. Some like to mix up with a crowd, some like to be alone. It's no one elses' business as far as I can see, but every time that I go out the people stare at me, with me little ukulele in me hand.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a George Formby: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Now everybody's got a crazy notion of their own. Some like to mix up with a crowd, some like to b…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, time, alone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de alone e crazy.
